Light is the quiet architect of serene moments. We design sensory spaces and minimalist wooden structures that invite tranquility, crafted carefully for the slow-living visionary.

No. 201 Ceramic Collection
OUR PHILOSOPHY

Harmonious proportions,
crafted for daily quietude.

We believe objects carry the energy of their crafting. Every curve is planned, every piece of premium white oak is handpicked, and every join is sealed with slow-curing oils to remain stunning for decades.

I

Tactile Geometry

Soft circular edges that feel exceptionally warm and intuitive to trace with your hand.

01 / TOUCHPOINTS
II

Sustainable Soul

Sourced from managed Nordic forests with structural integrity meant to outlast trends.

02 / FORESTRY
III

Luminous Space

Each design acts like a soft reflector, utilizing ambient room light to create gentle shadows.

03 / CALM ATMOSPHERE
EXPERIENCE DESIGN ATELIER

Pesque, teronages
to shape your sensory experiences.

Join our exclusive private catalog for quarterly releases, limited architectural insights, and first access to unique woodworks crafted in our Copenhagen studio.
